title: loxodiscus coriaceus
intro: Loxodiscus coriaceus is a plant species that belongs to the family Apocynaceae, commonly known as the dogbane family. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include the presence of various bioactive compounds such as alkaloids and glycosides. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. In herbal preparations, the leaves and roots of Loxodiscus coriaceus are often used to make infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal benefits.
